name: 婚禮退婚打臉
description: 在眾目睽睽的婚禮上說出「我不願意」，當場公開渣男出軌證據。觀眾積壓的憤怒在這一刻完全釋放——最公開的場合、最響亮的拒絕、最徹底的羞辱。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: Do you take Mr. Yen as your husband? I don't. / Go, what are you doing? Are you out of your mind? / I want to call off the engagement.
